lines.speaker: Dryad
lines.text: Greetings, I am trying to rejuvenate the forests with a ritual. Would you like to help?

lines.speaker: Dryad
lines.text: Oh, well, if you change your mind, just ask.

lines.speaker: Dryad
lines.text: If you could help block the odd ritual circles by standing on them, I will be able to power up the ritual.

lines.speaker: Dryad
lines.text: Under one-quarter of the ritual steps have been completed.

lines.speaker: Dryad
lines.text: Over one-quarter of the ritual steps have been completed.

lines.speaker: Dryad
lines.text: Over half the ritual steps have been completed.

lines.speaker: Dryad
lines.text: Over three-quarters of the ritual steps were completed. Well done!

lines.speaker: Dryad
lines.text: You all completed every ritual step, amazing!
